scope: zero-training audit of an exact parent-orbital DeepSet statistic after the aggregate pair descriptor in the global-interaction audit proved over-compressed

scientific_contract.representation: the exact unordered pair orbits are retained as elements of an unordered set; each element contains a target-free pair-action descriptor and its species-pair count vector
scientific_contract.shared_energy: a future scorer may apply one shared function to each orbital element and sum over the set; it may not use an orbit index, prototype ID or target-derived metadata
scientific_contract.identical_descriptor_policy: orbitals with identical target-free descriptors remain separate set elements; their colored statistics are compared as a multiset rather than summed before scoring
scientific_contract.target_role: target assignments are evaluation labels only
scientific_contract.normalization_boundary: this audit establishes representational identifiability only; it does not solve or qualify global normalization

decision_rule.pass: the minimal exact-orbital set interaction is expressively supported; next audit a tractable normalized law and freeze the independent IID/OOD split before training
decision_rule.fail: second-order orbital sets remain insufficient; do not train and audit the smallest higher-order or assignment-level latent statistic
decision_rule.boundary: This audit cannot qualify assignment, its normalization, generated-C, p(N), L1/M1, tensor work, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
